title: Eriocarpha
taxonomy: Eriocarpha is a genus of flowering plants in the family Alseuosmiaceae. It is native to Australia and New Guinea. The genus is part of the order Apiales and is closely related to the families Apiaceae and Araliaceae. Eriocarpha species are shrubs or small trees that have small, star-shaped flowers. The classification of Eriocarpha is within the kingdom Plantae.
